Figure 2: Architecture of hierarchical reasoning model.

Table 7: Test accuracy of CMMNSDE 512 on Sudoku-Extreme benchmark. General features: D = 512, B = 250, Ngrad = 4, AMP, Naccum = 2, NH = 3, NL = 6, StableMax3, equilibrium in ẑH, repulsion for ẑH and x̂, MLP-mixer, σ = 0.01.

Table 6: Test accuracy of CMMNODE 512 on Sudoku-Extreme benchmark. General features: D = 512, AMP, Nsuper = 16, Naccum = 2, NH = 3, NL = 6, StableMax3, equilibrium in x̂ and ẑH, repulsion for ẑH and x̂, MLP-mixer, number of parameters is 5M, learning rate is 10−4.

Figure 8: (a) represents the integration of the system of differential equations (20) during training according to the descriptions in [1, 7]; (b), (c), and (d) represent the integration of the system of differential equations (20) during training according to the official code for these papers. Panels (b), (c), and (d) correspond to batches i, i+ 1, and i+ 2, respectively.

Table 9: Dependence of accuracy of CMM on NH and NL for Sudoku-Extreme benchmark. General features: D = 128, AMP, Nsuper = 16, Naccum = 2, Ngrad = 3, MLP-mixer, number of parameters is 0.5M, StableMax3 is the loss function for the majority of the experiments, equilibrium in x̂ and ẑH, repulsion for ẑH and x̂, learning rate is 10−4, epsilon of the optimizer Adam is 10−12, ẑH and ẑL are initialized by x̂ and 0̂, respectively, at the beginning of the 1st segment of training.

Table 10: Dependence of accuracy of CMM on different features for Sudoku-Extreme benchmark. General features: D = 128, NH = 3, NL = 6, AMP, Nsuper = 16, Naccum = 16, Ngrad = 16, B = 1000, MLP-mixer, number of parameters is 0.5M, StableMax3 is the loss function for the majority of the experiments, equilibrium in x̂ and ẑH, repulsion for ẑH and x̂, learning rate is 2× 10−3, freeze embedding after 2500 epoch, AlgGradNorm, epsilon of the optimizer Adam is epsAdam = 10−12, ẑH and ẑL are initialized by x̂ and 0̂, respectively, at the beginning of the 1st segment of training.

Table 4: Dependence of accuracy of CMMNODE 512 on NH and NL for Sudoku-Extreme benchmark. General features: D = 512, AMP, Nsuper = 16, Ngrad = 1, B = 256, MLP-mixer, number of parameters is 5M, SiLU is activation function for main part of experiments, StableMax is loss for main part of experiments.

Table 5: Test accuracy of CMMNODE 512 on Sudoku-Extreme benchmark. General features: D = 512, B = 256, AMP, Nsuper = 16, NrmH = 2, NrmH = 4, StableMax3, equilibrium in x̂ and ẑH, MLP-mixer, number of parameters is 5M.

Figure 7: Illustration to repulsion loss term. (a) is initial hidden representation, (b) is projection to the surface of a unit hypersphere, (c) is projection after using repulsion loss term, (d) is hidden representation after using repulsion loss term.
